Even an older model with little resale value can be put to excellent use as a second monitor for your computer. Having that extra screen — to reference documents while you write, or multitask during video calls — can dramatically improve your productivity when working from home.
Macユーザーなら標準機能「Sidecar」が最強: For Mac Users: Apple's Built-in Sidecar is the Best Option
もしお使いのパソコンがMacで、iPadも比較的新しいOS（iPadOS 13以: If you're on a Mac and your iPad runs iPadOS 13 or later, Apple's built-in Sidecar feature is the easiest and highest-quality option available.
MacとiPadを同じApple IDでログインし、Wi-FiとBluetoot: Sign in to both your Mac and iPad with the same Apple ID and make sure Wi-Fi and Bluetooth are on. Then open System Settings on your Mac, go to Displays, click the Add button, and select your iPad. That's it — your iPad becomes a high-quality second monitor with virtually no lag. Works wirelessly or over a cable.

Install a server driver on your PC and the Spacedesk app on your iPad, and as long as both are on the same Wi-Fi network, your iPad becomes a wireless monitor. ※注意点として、古いiPadをサブディスプレイとして長時間利用する場合、バッテリ: Note: Using an old iPad as a second monitor for extended periods can cause the battery to heat up. Turning the brightness down slightly and ensuring good airflow around the device will help extend its lifespan.
